name: Poinsettia
directions: Pour cranberry juice and triple sec into a chilled 6 oz.
champagne glass.
Add lime juice to taste (I skip this part because it seems too tart mixed with the already tart juice and dry champagne).
Top with champagne.
Add more or less juice to your liking.
Make sure all ingredients are very cold!
If you want to add ice use a wine glass (8 or 9 oz).
Anything larger will leave you with flat champagne by the end.

name: Clamato Sipper
directions: Combine the ingredients (except celery sticks).
in a saucepan and heat until quite warm, stir once or twice.
To serve moisten the rim of each glass and dip in celery salt.
Pop in a celery stick and serve warm.

name: Peanutty Breakfast Mugs
directions: In blender container combine milk,peanut butter,and honey.
Blend till smooth,about 30 seconds.
Pour into 4 cup glass.
Heat on high for 4 minutes,just till bubbly.
Pour into four heat proof mugs.
Top with marshmellow.
Heat mugs at high for 30 seconds till marshmellows puff.

name: Fruity Purple Cow
directions: Slice bananas into 1 inch pieces, freeze on baking tins.
Blend frozen bananas with all other ingredients until smooth.
Serve immediately.
You may like to experiment with other fruits.

name: Joggin in a Jug
directions: Mix all together and keep refrigerated. Stir well (or shake) before drinking.
Take 2-4 ounces every morning and every night.
Makes approximately 2 1/2 qts. Will keep for up to three weeks in refrigerator.

name: Vanilla Latte
directions: Heat milk in small saucepan on low heat until warm, stirring briskly and constantly with wire whisk to create foam.
Remove from heat; stir in vanilla.
Stir coffee into milk mixture.
Serve immediately (they recommend with Nilla wafers).
Other flavour option: 1/4 teaspoons almond extract instead of vanilla.

similar.name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)

name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)
directions: Pour cold milk into a saucepan and heat on medium heat just until too hot to put your finger into it.
Pour espresso into 2 mugs.
Pour the steamed milk into mugs over the brewed espresso.
Enjoy!

name: Tea Protein Shake - the New Energy
directions: Mix everything in blender. Blend for 2 minutes. Enjoy!
Note: You can use soy protein powder or whey protein powder. Also regarding the soy milk, I prefer soy milk fortified with calcium for extra benefits.

name: French Toast
directions: Combine ingredients over cracked ice in cocktail shaker.
Shake and pour into a glass.
Lightly dust with cinnamon and swirl with cinnamon stick or straw.

name: Banana Milk Drink
directions: Place the first four ingredients in a blender; cover and process until smooth.
Pour into glasses; sprinkle with cinnamon if desired.
Serve immediately.
Enjoy.

name: Mocha Breakfast Coffee
directions: Mix together hot coffee and chocolate syrup in a big coffee mug.
Then add the milk stirring.
Top mocha coffee with whipped cream and a dash of cinnamon.
Serve.

similar.name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)

name: Hot Cocoa Mix in a Jar (Nestle)
directions: COMBINE dry milk, sugar, cocoa and marshmallows in large bowl.
Pour into 2-quart jar or tall container.
Seal with lid and decorate with fabric and ribbon.
RECIPE TO ATTACH:
Measure 1/2 cup cocoa mix into mug. Stir in 1 cup hot water or milk.

similar.name: Tea Protein Shake - the New Energy

name: Cottage Cheese With Vermicelli Fritters
directions: Mix the vermicelli, cottage cheese, egg yolks, chives, onions, flour, salt and pepper.
Whisk the egg whites until stiff, tehn fold lightly into cottage cheese mixture.
Drop spoonfuls into hot oil and brown on both sides.
Drain well on paper towels.

name: Vanilla Sin Latte
directions: Combine coffee with syrups.
Top with hot milk & enjoy!

name: Protein Shake
directions: Mix all in a blender.
Pour and enjoy.

name: Monkey Latte
directions: Blend syrups & coffee together.
Top up with hot milk.

name: Snickers Latte
directions: Combine all ingredients in mug.

name: Banana Split Mocha
directions: Blend all ingredients together & mix well.

name: Simple Coconut Mocha
directions: Combine all ingredients in a standard size mug.
Enjoy.

name: Jungle Mocha
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large mug.
Enjoy!

name: Breakfast  Colada
directions: Process the pineapple juice, rum, coconut cream, banana and ice cubes in a blender until smooth.
Pour into a tall glass and garnish with the lime.

name: Coco Caramel Latte
directions: Combine coffee & syrups & top up with steamed milk.

name: Nutty Monkey Mocha
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 360ml (12oz) mug.

name: Macadamia Nut Mocha
directions: Combine ingredients in a 360ml mug (12oz).

name: Bartender's Breakfast
directions: Pour all ingredients into a blender without ice.
Blend until smooth.
Strain into a highball glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a cherry tomato and basil leaves on a cocktail stick if desired.

name: Butternut Latte
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 360ml (12oz) mug.

name: Butterscotch Mocha
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 360ml (12oz) cup.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Latte
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 360ml (12 ounce) mug.

name: Caramel Butterscotch Latte.
directions: Combine ingredients in a 360ml (12 ounce) mug.

name: Wattleseed Caffee Latte or Wattlecino
directions: Use the wattle seed as you would coffee in your coffee maker, let the machine do it's work making a wattle espresso.
Top with steamed milk.

name: Iced Coffee Milo Frappe
directions: Dissolve NESCAFÉ BLEND 43 Instant Coffee, NESTLÉ MILO and sugar in hot water.
Combine in shaker or blender with remaining ingredients, shake or blend until combined.
Pour into serving glasses.  Top with extra ice, garnish as desired.

name: Irish Cinnamon Latte
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large mug.

name: Hazelnut Divinity Latte
directions: Combine ingredients in a 12 oz cup. Mix well.

name: Melya (Choc Honey Coffee)
directions: Brew espresso. In a coffee mug, place 1 teaspoon of unsweetened powdered cocoa, then cover a teaspoon with honey and drizzle it into the cup.

Stir while the coffee brews, this is the fun part. The cocoa seems to coat the honey without mixing, so you get a dusty, sticky mass that looks as though it will never mix. Then all at once, presto! It looks like dark chocolate sauce.
Pour hot espresso over the honey, stirring to dissolve. Serve with milk & cream.

similar.name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)

name: Banana Nut Java
directions: Combine syrups & coffee and then top up with steamed milk.

name: Blueberry Cream Breve
directions: Combine syrups and espresso. Top up with half milk & half cream.

name: Caramel Cinnamon Apple Latte
directions: Combine syrups & espresso. Top up with steamed milk.

name: Coburn's Chai Tea Mix
directions: Bring everything to a hard boil, then turn it off and let steep for a couple of hours. Transfer to the fridge. When ready to enjoy, strain mixture into a mug, add low fat milk or vanilla flavoured soya milk(preferred) in a 1:1 ratio and heat in the microwave or stovetop. Add extra honey of desired.
If you like chai tea you will love this,at a fraction of the cost of buying premade mixes.

name: Butterscotch Eggnog Latte
directions: Combine all ingredients in a mug & mix until butterscotch chips have melted & all is combined.
Enjoy!

name: Chilled Mocha
directions: -Put coffee in a tall glass and add water.
-Put in freezer for 10-15 minutes to chill.
-Pour into a blender, add the remaining ingredients, and blend.
-Enjoy!

name: Berry Vanilla Ecstasy
directions: COMBINE water, milk and coffee granules in large mug; stir until coffee is dissolved. Stir in Nesquik and sugar. Top with whipped cream. Serve immediately.

name: Healthy Sunrise
directions: Place cold strawberries in juicer, followed by cold grapefruits.  Serve.

name: French Toast
directions: Combine in a shot glass.

name: Zebra Mocha
directions: Combine coffee & syrups, top up with milk and serve with whipped cream & sprinkles.

name: Easy Tea-Less Chai
directions: Put honey in mug, microwave for about 10 seconds.

Add spices to honey. I did not include amounts in recipe as for a single serving, this is little more than a "pinch" or "sprinkle" of each, you will probably have to play around with the recipe a few times before you know exactly what proportions you prefer. Stir spices in with honey until blended together smoothly.
Add milk to honey and spice, microwave about 2-3 minutes, or until hot. Stir well, if it's lost temperature from stirring, microwave briefly to reheat. Enjoy!

name: East Texas Mocha
directions: Combine coffee with the alcohol and then top up with milk.

name: Frozen Fruit Cups
directions: In a colander drain fruit from cans and then put into a 4 quart or larger bowl.
Add fruit punch concentrate, marachino cherries with juice and sliced bananas to bowl of drained fruit.
Add 1 cup water and mix gently.
Spoon about 1/2 cup fruit mixture into 9 oz. plastic cups.
Divide the rest of the juice evenly into all the fruit cups.
Top off the fruit with about 1/4 cup of 7-up soda.
Freeze 3 hours or more.
You can defrost the cups for a few seconds in the microwave to get a more slushy type consistency.

similar.name: Kale and Avocado Smoothies for the Week

name: Lauren's Masala Chai Concentrate
directions: special note about spices (If you have a bulk foods or Whole Foods or Vitamin Cottage kind of grocer nearby, get the spices from the bulk section. They often cost 25% what you'd pay for a jar! My total ingredients expense was around $1.50, not including the milk!).
In a medium-large saucepan, bring about 7 cups water to a boil.
Meanwhile, add the 6 spices (do not add the tea yet).
Once the water/spice mixture is boiling, add the tea.

Boil 5 minutes, then remove from heat.  (I know you're never supposed to boil tea, but I found this works just fine.  If you don't want to boil the tea, just boil the spices for 5 minutes and steep slightly longer.).
Stir in the brown sugar (or honey) and vanilla.
Steep for 8 minutes, then strain into a glass container.

While you wait for it to cool, pour a mug 2/3 full with your chai and add hot milk to the top.  (If it isn't spicy or sweet enough, you can still add more spices to steep - just strain the mixture again before storing.) OR for a real treat, use hot evaporated milk (I wouldn't want this every day, because its a little sweeter and creamier than regular milk.).

Store in the refrigerator for 7 days (maybe longer, but all chai concentrate containers claim 7 days is best).  Note: Normally you'd use 1:1 ratio of chai:milk, but I brew it a little weaker and save $ on milk since I drink so much chai.

name: Tamworth Breakfast
directions: In one quick motion, spin & flick the Angostura bitters straight from the bottle around the inside of the glass in a circular motion just to form a random partial lining on inside of glass.
Add ice to glass, pour vodka over ice, pour sweetened lime juice over ice & top off with Schweppes Lemonade or Sprite.

name: Just Right Rice/Oat Milk
directions: Add rice and oats to 2 cups water. Bring to boiling, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add other ingredients while combination is still warm, so honey dissolves easily,.
Blend together in a blender. Start at low speed, increasing speed to high gradually, until well blended.
Add 2 cups of water (Can use ice cubes for part of this to cool milk more quickly), blending thoroughly.
Have the remaining 2 cups of water (include part as ice cubes here too, if desired) waiting in a container.
Strain the rice/oat mixture through a fine sieve. (I think the strained solids are a tasty small serving of cooked cereal).
Add rice/oat milk to the water in container and shake well. This may be too thick for your liking. Just add more water until it reaches the desired consistency.
Enjoy!
(cooking time doesn't include time to cook rice before adding to recipe).

similar.name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)

name: Chocolate-Coconut Iced Coffee
directions: Combine instant coffee granules with water in a tall glass and stir until dissolved.
Add the Almond Breeze (or low-fat milk of your choice), syrups and sweetener and stir.
Add ice cubes and if desired top it off with whipped cream and a little chocolate sauce!

name: Chocolate Double the Milk Shake Recipe
directions: Freeze an overripe banana, peeled and wrapped, 12 to 24 hours before making this shake.
Puree all the ingredients in a blender. Serve immediately.

name: Breakfast Drink
directions: Put everything in measuring jug and blend with stick blender.

name: Jade Coffee
directions: Put your water in the kettle and boil.

While your water is boiling, put your sugar, vanilla, and blue food colouring in the cup. About 8-10 drops will make a very vibrant blue. [Add more or less, to make the colouring of your choosing]; Stir. The sugar will get a little clumpy, but that's okay. It's going to get wet soon any ways.
When the kettle goes off [or your water boils], turn your water off; pour the instant coffee in with the blue sugar, [stir or don't stir; your choice].

Pour the hot water 2/3 of the way full [or a little less if you like a lot of milk.] Stir the coffee, sugar, and water together before adding the milk. It should look like brown muddy water with a ring of blue around the top edges of the cup(if using a white mug).
Pour the desired amount of milk in; stir. [remember, the more milk you use, the lighter the colour of jade coffee].
Warning: Your tongue and teeth will turn blue-ish after drinking!

similar.name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)

name: Starbuck's Frappicino (Copycat)
directions: Brew the espresso, ( I use 1/4c. espresso to 4 Celsius water) take a side the 3 oz. of coffee.
Add the sugar and vanilla, stir till dissovled.
Add the Half and half stir.
Pour over ice cubes and serve.

similar.name: Tea Protein Shake - the New Energy

name: Morning Mocha Smoothie (South Beach Diet Phase 1)
directions: Process in blender until frothy.

name: Instant Chocolate Indulgence
directions: Add water and instant coffee in a heatproof cup or mug.
Heat coffee in a microwave until it's hot.
Add the snack size chocolate candy bars to the coffee.
Stir until the chocolate in coffee has melted.
Pour in the half-and-half cream, and stir.
Top coffee with some Reddi Wip, or add a dollop of Cool Whip.
Note: If the coffee doesn't seem to be hot enough after adding the cream, you may want to reheat your coffee just a bit in your microwave, and before topping it with the whipped topping.

name: Watermelon Cucumber Detox - Energy Juice (No Juicer Required)
directions: Using a blender, pulse everything into a thick smooth consistency.
Sieve this mixture into a big bowl and refrigerate for few minutes.
Pour in tall glass and enjoy.

similar.name: Green Smoothie - for Beginner - No Pulp (Blended)
Kale and Avocado Smoothies for the Week

name: Green Smoothie - for Beginner - No Pulp (Blended)
directions: Blend all the mentioned ingredients together into a smooth mixture.
Sieve and pour into a serving glass.

similar.name: Kale and Avocado Smoothies for the Week

name: Chocolate Banana Coffee Protein Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Serve.

similar.name: Morning Mocha Smoothie (South Beach Diet Phase 1)

name: Chai Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth, 30-60 seconds.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Kale and Avocado Smoothies for the Week

name: Caramel Latte, Sans Espresso Machine
directions: Place sugar and 1/2 cup water into small pot and bring to low heat. Stir until sugar dissolves.

Turn heat to medium high (until the mixture boils) and stir constantly for 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat and continue to stir to mixture doesn't burn. Then add rest of water and let cool. Store leftover caramel syrup in glass container with lid for future lattes.
Pour creamer into a glass or plastic container with lid. Shake vigorously (I hop in place while shaking) for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Fill two mugs with fresh brewed dark roast coffee, add 1-2 tablespoons of caramel syrup (to taste), then add frothy creamer. Spoon extra froth on top. Enjoy!

similar.name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)

name: Easy Mimosa
directions: Place the OJ and the champagne in the fridge the day before so that the OJ will be thawed and the champagne will be chilled.
In the morning, before breakfast (Or whenever you choose to enjoy this.) pour the OJ into a 1/2 gallon pitcher, followed by the champagne and mix with a large spoon.
Pour into chilled champagne flutes and enjoy!

similar.name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)

name: Kale and Avocado Smoothies for the Week
directions: Place the yogurt in blender first, then add kale.  If you do not have a powerful blender, I suggest blending the kale and yogurt alone first.  Then add the bananas, berries, stevia, avocados and blend again. Add the ground chia seeds last, as it can thicken quickly.
Divide the bulk smoothies among (1 cup) jam jars, apply a reusable plastic lid if desired.  Sometimes I just freeze them without the lid and then apply a lid during the thaw.
Take 1 smoothie jar out of the freezer the night before.  Stir before sipping.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Green Smoothie - for Beginner - No Pulp (Blended)

name: Strawberry Pina Colada Smoothie
directions: Note: I used Dannon Light& Fit Greek Yogurt in Strawberry Cheesecake.
Place all ingredients in blender, liquids first, and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Kale and Avocado Smoothies for the Week

name: Hot, Buttery Coffee (Bulletproof Coffee)
directions: You can use coffee brewed using any method - drip, french press, Americano, or you can buy fresh coffee from a cafe. Don't use instant coffee.

Place butter in a blender, pour in coffee and blend until emulsified.* A thin froth will form on top. The ratio of coffee to butter can vary as much as you like. I usually use about as much as I would on an average piece of toast.
Pour into a coffee mug and enjoy!

* Blending hot liquids can be dangerous, so be careful! Don't use anything air-tight, such as a Nutribullet. I use an immersion blender in a tall cup, and I wrap a tea towel around the top to prevent hot splatter. You can also use a traditional blender with cloth placed over the pour hole.

similar.name: Simple Caffe Latte (Cafe Quality at Home!)

name: Cherry-Almond Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and mix.
Pour into glass and enjoy!

similar.name: Green Smoothie - for Beginner - No Pulp (Blended)

name: POMEGRANATE AVOCADO DETOX SMOOTHIE
directions: In a blender, add all the ingredients and process until smooth. Serve immediately.
If the smoothie is too thick, add a little more milk.

similar.name: Kale and Avocado Smoothies for the Week
Green Smoothie - for Beginner - No Pulp (Blended)

name: Best Cinnamon Maple Coffee Ever
directions: Brew 10 ounces of the snickernut cookie coffee.
Add in the three creamers.
Add honey.
Add Maple Syrup.
Add packet of stevia if needed.
Enjoy!
